items.title: Gave up 83 points to Bam Adebayo, fined $750,000 in January for not playing Boki Nachbar and Mike Penberthy in fourth quarters, and started 3-73 before winning the final three games, but nobody cared because Yuki Kawamura finished fourth in the league in assists.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Gave up 83 points to Bam Adebayo, fined $750,000 in January for not playing Boki Nachbar and Mike Penberthy in fourth quarters, and started 3-73 before winning the final three games, but nobody cared because Yuki Kawamura finished fourth in the league in assists.

items.title: [Jackson] Here’s what’s known, per league sources: The Heat’s interest in closing a deal is every bit as strong as it was before the trade deadline. As the Miami Herald reported in February, aside from Bam Adebayo, there has been no player deemed off limits in the Heat’s pursuit of Antetokounmpo.

items.title: All-NBA 3rd Team Chet Holgrem had less total points during 7 games of the 2026 WCF than Bam Adebayo put up in a single game
items.author: KarrotMovies
items.body_excerpt: Chet Holgrem averaged 17-9-2 on 56/36/79 splits during the regular season and earned himself an all-NBA 3rd Team selection. During the 2026 WCF, he put a total of 75 points (10.7 PPG) Bam Adebayo on March 10, 2026 put up 83 points. Has never made an all-NBA team in his career…
